supersedes.reason: v3 incorporates verified DSM-1 evidence and the P5/RV2 scope-overclaim investigation.

evidence.limitation: Receipt was reconstructed after the run by the external auditor from repository lifecycle evidence plus the operator-supplied job log.
RULE-005..RULE-010 are policy-only and runtime NOT_ENFORCED.
Static-only; not a substitute for run-level evidence.

critical_findings.finding: P5's all_target_rules_enforced=true is not evidence of operational runtime enforcement for RULE-005..RULE-010. The runner only validates the registry schema and mutations of that schema.
critical_findings.effect: P5 cannot be used to claim broad all-rule operational enforcement; RV2's narrow classification is controlling for release audit.

external_audit_checklist: Verify all paths and blob SHA values against the repository.
Verify the DSM1 trace/task/run correspondence and the dual-source provenance.
Verify the P5/RV2 investigation conclusion from the runner source and both historical receipts.
Treat RULE-005..RULE-010 as runtime NOT_ENFORCED unless new operational guard evidence is produced.
Issue the sole P7 verdict: APPROVED or BLOCKED.
limitations: This package does not assert a Broad Release PASS.
This package does not close T7 or rely on live concurrency evidence.
This package does not change the historical P5 or RV2 artifacts.
Only EXTERNAL_AUDITOR_CLAUDE may issue the final P7 verdict.
